name: M6 World Championship - Liquipedia Mobile Legends: Bang Bang Wiki
snippet: The M6 World Championship (also known as M6) is the sixth annual edition of the Mobile Legends: Bang Bang World Championship organized by Moonton. It served as the culminating event of the 2024 competitive season, bringing together the top teams from around the world.

name: MLBB M6 World Championship - Wikipedia
snippet: Following the EWC's announcement, Mobile Legends: Bang Bang introduced a remarketed logo for the game alongside a new world championship competition, the Magic Chess Go Go World Championship which will be occurring by next year.

name: M6 World Championship: Schedule, format, teams, where to watch
snippet: Here’s everything you need to know about the M6 World Championship, including its schedule, format, qualified teams, and where to watch.

name: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang 2025 Esports Roadmap revealed, M7
snippet: MOONTON Games announced that its two international tournaments — the MLBB Mid Season Cup (MSC) and M Series — will return. The MSC 2025 will take place from mid-July to early August 2025, while MLBB's flagship M7 World Championship will return in January 2026.

name: M6 World Championship: Teams, format, schedule, prize, and more
snippet: Find all essential information regarding the M6 World Championship in here. The M6 World Championship is just around the corner, with teams worldwide securing their spots for the pinnacle of Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) esports.

name: Mobile Legends M6 World Championship setup revamped with
snippet: For those who still remember the M1 World Championship, it has always used a single round-robin format during the group stage up to M5, where every team matches up with all the other teams. However, with the Swiss format in M6, there will be some exciting changes. Let’s explain.

name: MLBB M6 World Championship: Teams, Format, Schedule, & More
snippet: The Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) World Championship or the M5 World Championship is set to take place in November and December 2023. Featuring a much wider format with a high prize pool this year, as many as 24 teams are set to battle it out for the title of champions.
